source: derived from chant JSON metadata; lyrics and media intentionally omitted

items.title: አሐደ ለከ
items.transliterationTitle: Ahade Leke we Ahade le Musie

items.title: ገብረመንፈሥ ቅዱሥ የአለም ብርሃን ናቸው
items.transliterationTitle: Gebre Menfes Kidus Ye’Alem Birhan Natchew

items.title: For There’s No One Like Him
I called unto my Dear Lord
items.transliterationTitle: I Called Unto My Dear Lord

items.title: I have seen all I need
items.transliterationTitle: I Have Seen All I Need

items.title: I know the one who has saved me
I will forever sing for my Lady
O My Savior I Can Do All Through You
Oh All That You Have Done For Me
On The Cross I Witnessed His Love
Our Lord and King of Peace
She Is Born For Us All
The Virgin Gave Birth to Her Creator
There Is No One Like You
There Is Power in Your Words
To Him Who Sits on the Throne
Walk in the Light of God
We Offer You Glory and Praise
With His Love The Lord Rescued Me
You’re the Soul for My Soul
አሐደ ለከ
items.transliterationTitle: Ahade Leke we Ahade le Musie
